summary: Iteration 15 - Routes refactoring verification complete. All 38 backend tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed. server.py successfully reduced from 2100+ to 870 lines. 6 route modules created and working: auth.py, properties.py, compliance.py, tasks.py, notifications.py, billing.py.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Constants endpoint returns all required constants
Backend: Demo mode creates Portfolio account
Backend: Signup creates Solo trial account
Backend: Login with valid credentials works
Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: Password reset request returns success (MOCKED)
Backend: GET /properties returns list (3 demo properties)
Backend: GET property by ID works
Backend: Get compliance record documents works
Backend: Mark all notifications read works
Backend: Dashboard data returns complete structure
Backend: AI property insights endpoint works
Frontend: Landing page loads with Staylet branding
Frontend: Demo Mode button works, navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (3 properties, 2 expiring, 2 overdue, 6 tasks)
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Portfolio (Trial)' for demo user
Frontend: Properties page shows 3 demo properties
Frontend: Compliance page shows 12 records with status badges
Frontend: Tasks page shows 6 tasks with priority badges
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 2100+ to 870 lines
6 route modules cleanly separated: auth.py, properties.py, compliance.py, tasks.py, notifications.py, billing.py
All routes properly registered via api_router.include_router()
Database connection properly shared via models/database.py
Auth utilities properly shared via utils/auth.py
Email service gracefully handles missing RESEND_API_KEY
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration15_routes_refactoring.py - Created comprehensive routes verification test suite

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary Portfolio account via 'Try Demo Mode' button
test_credentials.new_signup: Any valid email/password (8+ chars) creates Solo plan trial account

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates: 3 UK properties (Victoria Terrace Apartment, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh Old Town Flat), 12 compliance records with mixed statuses (compliant, expiring_soon, overdue), 6 tasks with varied priorities
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 routes refactoring verification complete. All 6 route modules working correctly. server.py now 870 lines (down from 2100+). Route modules: /routes/auth.py (auth endpoints), /routes/properties.py (CRUD + PDF export), /routes/compliance.py (CRUD + documents), /routes/tasks.py (CRUD + templates), /routes/notifications.py (notifications + user preferences), /routes/billing.py (subscription + Stripe checkout). Email sending MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY not configured).

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Resend email service gracefully skipped when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
mocked_apis.password_reset_email: Returns success message but no actual email sent
